Language: German
Status: fachliche Modell- und Forschungsdokumentation, version 0.4
Start: /index.md
Overview: /00-meta/index.md
Principles: /01-produkt/vision-und-grundsaetze.md

Public spending: /02-fiskal/ausgaben-und-leistungen.md
Synthetic population: /03-daten/synthetische-bevoelkerung.md

Indirect effects: /04-modell/indirekte-und-nichtmonetaere-wirkungen.md
Uncertainty: /04-modell/unsicherheit-und-szenarien.md

Excluded from public documentation: software architecture, internal requirements, design prompts and implementation planning.
